root_cause.text: The `ReadDPXImage` function fails to check for an End-Of-File (EOF) condition while advancing the file pointer in a loop up to a specified offset, allowing a crafted DPX file with an artificially large offset to trigger an excessive number of iterations resulting in CPU exhaustion.
root_cause.evidence: The patch modifies `for` loops in `coders/dpx.c` by adding an EOF check `if (ReadBlobByte(image) == EOF) break;` to prematurely terminate the loop if the end of the file is reached before the target offset (`dpx.file.image_offset` or `data_offset`).

agent_logs.root_cause_candidate: The `ReadDPXImage` function fails to check for an End-Of-File (EOF) condition while advancing the file pointer in a loop up to a specified offset, allowing a crafted DPX file with an artificially large offset to trigger an excessive number of iterations resulting in CPU exhaustion.
agent_logs.evidence_points: The patch modifies `for` loops in `coders/dpx.c` by adding an EOF check `if (ReadBlobByte(image) == EOF) break;` to prematurely terminate the loop if the end of the file is reached before the target offset (`dpx.file.image_offset` or `data_offset`).

intent_record.intent_summary: Add EOF checks when advancing to the image offset to prevent reading past the end of a truncated file.
intent_record.what: Modified the offset advancement loop to check the return value of ReadBlobByte for EOF, and added a subsequent check to throw an exception if the end of the file was reached unexpectedly.
intent_record.how: Prevents the program from infinitely looping or reading out of bounds if the file is truncated before the expected image offset is reached.

intent_record.intent_summary: Add EOF check when skipping bytes to prevent reading past the end of the file.
intent_record.what: Modified the byte-reading loop to check the return value of ReadBlobByte and break if it equals EOF.
intent_record.how: Prevents infinite loops or unnecessary reads by safely exiting the loop if the end of the file is reached before the target offset.

grouping_result.intent: Add EOF check when skipping bytes to prevent reading past the end of the file.

consistency_review.core_intent: Add EOF checks when advancing or skipping bytes to prevent reading past the end of the file.

relevance_review.reason: The group directly addresses the vulnerability by adding the missing EOF checks when advancing the file pointer to a specified offset, preventing the CPU exhaustion loop.

candidates.rationale: This loop advances the file pointer up to the image offset without checking for EOF, which can cause CPU exhaustion if the offset is artificially large in a crafted file.
This statement inside the loop consumes bytes without checking for EOF, contributing to the CPU exhaustion.
Similar to the other loop, this advances the file pointer up to data_offset without checking for EOF.
This statement inside the loop consumes bytes without checking for EOF.

vuln_statements.explanation: This loop advances the file pointer up to the image offset without checking for EOF, causing CPU exhaustion if the offset is artificially large.
This loop advances the file pointer up to data_offset without checking for EOF, which can cause CPU exhaustion.
This statement consumes bytes inside the loops without checking if an EOF condition has been reached.
